name: Canon Pack
description: Portable container of world truth. Holds spoiler-level lore: causes, timelines, secrets, faction motivations, metaphysical rules. Canon Packs can be shared across multiple books using the same world. Creative agents consult canon; players never see it. Lore Weaver is the exclusive producer.

fields.name: ifid
fields.description: References the parent Story's IFID (optional, for story-scoped canon)

fields.name: title
fields.description: Human-readable title for this lore collection

fields.name: theme
fields.description: Primary theme or domain (e.g., 'Faction Politics', 'Metaphysics', 'Timeline: Age of Founding')

fields.name: scope
fields.description: Whether this pack is book-specific or shared across the world

fields.name: summary
fields.description: Brief overview of what this pack covers (for agent context loading)

fields.name: entries
fields.description: Individual lore entries within this pack

properties.name: term
properties.description: The concept, entity, or event being documented

properties.name: truth
properties.description: The spoiler-level fact(s) about this term

properties.name: causes
properties.description: What led to this / why this is true

properties.name: timeline_position
properties.description: When this occurred or became true (relative or absolute)

properties.name: relationships
properties.description: References to related canon entries (by entry_id)

fields.name: timeline_anchors
fields.description: Key temporal reference points for this pack

properties.name: relative_to
properties.description: Reference to another anchor if relative

fields.name: consistency_notes
fields.description: Notes on how this pack relates to other canon, any constraints

fields.name: source_materials
fields.description: References to research memos or external sources this pack draws from

fields.name: origin_hooks
fields.description: Hook card IDs that triggered the creation or expansion of this canon pack

states.name: Draft
states.description: Pack is being assembled by Lore Weaver

states.name: Ready
states.description: Pack is complete and available for creative agents

states.name: Superseded
states.description: Pack has been replaced by a newer version
